message:
perf(btree,mvcc,connection): prechecked insert, handle recycling, memory autocommit fast path

btree cursor:
- Extract table_insert_from_current_position from table_insert and
  expose table_insert_prechecked_absent for callers that already
  positioned the cursor via table_move_to and observed NotFound,
  avoiding a redundant B-tree seek on the hot INSERT path.

mvcc begin_concurrent:
- Add ConcurrentHandle::reset_for_new_transaction to clear state while
  preserving allocation capacity across autocommit begin/commit cycles.
- Add ConcurrentRegistry handle recycling pool (max 8) so hot
  autocommit loops reuse Arc<Mutex<ConcurrentHandle>> instead of
  allocating fresh handles per statement.
- Extract hydrate_finalize_witness_state helper and defer witness
  materialization on the uncontended prepare fast path — witnesses are
  only hydrated in finalize when slow-path re-scanning is needed.
- Use remove_and_recycle at all session teardown call sites.

connection:
- Add :memory: autocommit fast path that skips staleness/publication
  binding (memory DBs cannot observe external commits).
- Add SharedMvccState::is_poisoned atomic flag for single-load
  background_status checks on the hot path.
- Guard compat trace Statement/Profile/Row emission behind per-mask
  checks instead of unconditional trace_registration.is_some().
- Lazily capture Instant::now for execution timing only when statement
  reuse or profile tracing is active.
- Skip autoincrement and column-default metadata collection for
  non-INSERT paths; share a static empty Arc for column defaults.
- Use SelectStatement::to_string() directly instead of wrapping in
  Statement::Select for compile cache keys.
- Fix IPK column splice in mem-table scan so SELECT over tables with
  INTEGER PRIMARY KEY returns the rowid at the correct column position.
- Only clone into scanned_cache when a later source may reuse the table.
- Move sync_change_tracking_context to execute_table_program entry so
  the direct wrapper (used by PreparedStatement) also resyncs.
- Use set_bindings_slice instead of set_bindings(params.to_vec()).
- Guard trace export timing behind tracing::enabled check.
- Add refresh_memdb_if_stale gate for in-memory databases that cannot
  become stale from external connections.

builtins:
- Add get_change_tracking_state reader for conditional sync optimization.

observability:
- Early-return from record_trace_export when debug target is disabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
